basics.name: Sean Marasigan
basics.label: Software Developer
basics.summary: Pushing business concept to code, solve the problem, innovate and keeping things simple. This is me. 🌀

responsibilities.title: Data Management Automation System
responsibilities.details: This is significantly a self-made low-code/configuration-first generic tool that define data models. Instead of requiring developers to hand-code every administrative page, the system will dynamically generate the necessary data tables, forms and pages based on admin configuration, with built-in user roles & rights, and packed with API automation & documentation which can really demonstrates the ability to build flexible and scalable solutions that reduce development time and effort.

responsibilities.title: Central Site Management
responsibilities.details: This is a site administration tool to automate the full installation and other setup process for multi-tenant in a multi-client application in a "software as a service" runtime stack. This tool streamlined the configuration and database setup for new clients, significantly reducing manual effort and deployment time.

responsibilities.title: Data Table Generic Component
responsibilities.details: This component allows for rapid creation of tables with various built-in functionalities, including automation for API data sources, form input, inline editing, column resizing, filtering & sorting, pagination, charts & graphs view, bulk data importing/exporting and CRUD operations, streamlining the development process and promoting code reusability.

work.name: Stok Manila Inc.

responsibilities.title: WordPress/Symfony Ecommerce Sites Development
responsibilities.details: this includes new features request, design revision, custom post types, fields, themes & plugins development and support services from existing client’s websites.

responsibilities.title: Business Transformation System
responsibilities.details: this is defined as a change management platform with solution packages like Compliance Transformation Efficiency, Collaborative Risk Management, Task and Project Management, also features different modules for collaboration, SWOT analysis and a problem-solving process with incident reporting and data monitoring.

responsibilities.title: Central Site Management and Supporting System
responsibilities.details: the main task of this application is to auto setup a client's site upon subscription. It auto creates a new registered subdomain URL and a new database for the client. It also handles the data management and configuration of dynamic source code setup based on application version.

responsibilities.title: Billing & Collection Management System (by subscription process)
responsibilities.details: this is a customer management system which autogenerate monthly billings for clients and send through their emails, handle payments through stripe payment gateway and to monitor balance, payment and billing histories of every subscriber.
Mainly responsible for creation of REST APIs, managing database on creation of tables, views, triggers, user-defined functions and stored procedures.

Task to manage web hosting servers with CentOS 7, Apache 2.2, Nginx, PHP 5.6/7.x, SSL, MySQL 5.6, and later migrated to use Docker application containers to ensure portability and consistency across multiple environments from development to production.

I also created an advance generic html table jQuery plugin with built-in features such as inline adding and editing, column sorting and filters, data pagination, data formatter templating, export to word/excel/pdf and bulk import data management tool, Kanban views options for task management table feature, and custom interactive Gantt table view for project tracking and monitoring.

Generates ledger reports like trial balance, income statement, profit & loss and balance sheet.

It generates reports such as payroll worksheet, paycard file for fund transfer, and other employee/government report requirements.

responsibilities.title: Customize Webform and Tracker for VICIDial Call Center Suite
responsibilities.details: this is an html form used to send customer data or email notifications that is customized for each client's needs. In this webform customer data is auto populated during calls, while customer call disposition is entered by the agents and submitted directly to the client web url address (API) after each call. This also includes a data tracker for report compilation.

responsibilities.title: Wiki Site for CSR/Clients
responsibilities.details: an online site of instruction and training manuals primarily for customer service representatives where our BPO clients allow to add, edit or delete content in a collaborative environment.

work.name: Primewater Infrastructure Corporation, ePrime Business Solutions, Inc.

responsibilities.title: Billing and Collections Management System (for water/HOA dues/cable utility services)
responsibilities.details: this is a customer management system with a complete billing cycle from water meter consumptions to bill computation, statement of accounts, and payment collection system. Also integrates with an account monitoring system for customer’s ledger and history of their bills, payments, meter readings, and outstanding balance.  This application also processes timely reports like payment collection, for disconnection report and collection efficiency.

responsibilities.title: Web Service Application for Water Meter Reading
responsibilities.details: as part of the project for centralized billing management, this application’s major function is to get or set data from the central database server to the remote offices and vice versa. Mainly for customer data downloading to uploading of water meter readings from their reading gadgets.

responsibilities.title: Web Based Data Reporting System
responsibilities.details: a web application for data reports exporting system and use particularly by client’s remote offices for their data retrieval, sample reports include “Daily Payment Collection” in calendar format, “Customer Ledger & History” and “Collection Efficiency Reports”. Reports are exported in different formats: MS Word, Excel, & PDF File.

responsibilities.title: SMS Text Blasting System
responsibilities.details: a text messaging service used for notification of current bill and due date, water interruption advisory, and other announcements.  Also include an automated response system responding to keywords from customer’s SMS texting inquiry like “PIC<space>BILL<space><customer number>”, responded automatically with their basic charge, balance and last payment. Templates and keywords are bind to SQL Server and automatically feed data from their respective databases.

responsibilities.title: Purchase Order & Inventory System
responsibilities.details: an item management system which includes material request, purchasing, receiving, issuance, return, price history and a near zero level monitoring, also include pump and motor monitoring system for all the deepwells around their subdivisions.

responsibilities.title: Materials Requisition and Approval System
responsibilities.details: a web application that is part of the “Purchase Order & Inventory System” used by company’s remote offices and affiliates for material requisition and viewing of request status and issuance schedule.

Put up a network of dedicated database servers for their system using MS SQL Server, a web server for ftp, web application & services using IIS Manager, including two terminal servers for their client’s remote access and provide regular database maintenance and management to their system.  This network also includes a firebox watchguard firewall for added security.

responsibilities.title: Payroll System
responsibilities.details: this project is typically for their payroll processing and payslip printing with auto-computation of personal loans, withholding tax, Philhealth, Pagibig & SSS and also integrates employee’s service records.

responsibilities.title: Library System
responsibilities.details: this project is a book inventory and activity tracking from its track and shelve position to someone who borrowed. Books were monitored by an automated tracking system and provided a list of borrowers with books on due.
Handled computer subjects particularly Programming (Visual Basic 6.0, HTML, Turbo C), Computer Installation & Troubleshooting, Networking, Security Issues and Preventive Maintenance.
Responsible for supervision, administration and maintenance of their computers and network system.

projects.name: Application Data Management
projects.description: This is an Application Data Management product for a Customer Relationship Management. This helps organizations make better use of their data, designing custom data structure or schema, improving their ability to make informed decisions and take action based on insights gleaned from the entity types data.
highlights: Dashboard Statistics: Live stat cards for CRM entities and all active post types with line, pie, bar (status) and bar (category) charts also have date-range filter data scopes for different viewing.
Custom Entity Types: Create and configure custom content types (e.g. Products, Invoices, Transactions) via the Post Type Settings panel

Dynamic Field Definitions: Each post type defines its own custom fields (string, number, boolean, date, text, array, object) stored as JSON. Fields automatically render in the table columns and the add/edit form.
Using Docker / Docker Compose development tools for microservice containerization
With interactive GraphQL Playground and Swagger API documentation
Future development will also leverage "Machine Learning & Workflow Automation" for effective data management.

projects.name: Personal SWOT Assistant
projects.description: A personal SWOT (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats) coaching app built in React Native with Expo. Acts as a dashboard-style coach in your pocket, with four customizable mentor personas, daily prompts, local persistence, charts, and weekly AI-style insights — no backend required.
highlights: Dashboard: Live pie chart of SWOT distribution, SWOT Factor Analysis (grouped bar + radar/spider chart with toggle), and 6-week trend line graph.
SWOT Logging: Add entries tagged as Strength, Weakness, Opportunity, or Threat.
Score Factors: Each entry accepts an Importance weight (0.01–1.0) and a Rating (1–3, for S/W: minor → major) or Probability (1–3, for O/T: low → high); score = importance × rating/probability.
Factor Analysis Chart: Dual-view chart toggled between a grouped bar chart and a radar/spider chart, both showing total entries and average score per SWOT group.
Persona Selector: Choose from 4 mentor styles; persisted across sessions.
Daily Prompts: Persona-specific reflection prompts, rotated daily.
Coach Messages: Contextual mentor feedback based on your logged data.
Weekly Summary: Aggregated breakdown with percentage split and mentor insight paragraph.
Guide Screen: Comprehensive walkthrough with SWOT principles, 6 real-life use cases (Career, Health, Learning, Relationships, Finance, Mental Health), expandable examples, and coach tips.
Full Offline: All data lives in AsyncStorage — no network required.

screenshots.label: SWOT Log Entry with Score Factors

projects.name: My Curriculum Vitae
projects.description: A landing page (this site) for a personal portfolio site, showcasing my skills, experiences, and projects.
highlights: Built with Astro, a modern static site generator that delivers lightning-fast performance and optimized SEO.
Implemented smooth animations and interactive elements using GSAP (GreenSock Animation Platform) for an engaging user experience.
Designed a responsive layout with Tailwind CSS, ensuring the website looks great on all devices.

projects.name: NextJS E-Commerce Store
projects.description: A simplified e-commerce web application with “https://dummyjson.com” API integration and was written in Next.js 16, React 19, Typescript, Tailwind CSS v4, Bun Package Manager and Radix UI with shadcn/ui pre-styled components.
highlights: Home Page - Random featured products section from different categories
Product Listing Page - Browse all products with search, filter, sort and pagination
Product Detail Page - View individual product details with image carousel

projects.name: Online Pizza Ordering System
projects.description: A Laravel 12 application for PizzaPlanet's online pizza ordering platform, demonstrating software engineering principles, design patterns, and clean architecture.
highlights: Multiple Preset Pizzas: Margherita, Romana, Americana, and Mexicana
Custom Pizza Builder: Create your own pizza with up to 4 toppings
Flexible Payment Options: Card and PayPal payment methods (mocked for demonstration)
Price Calculation Engine: Dynamic pricing based on pizza type and toppings
Shopping Cart: Full cart management with session persistence
Order Processing: Order creation and payment tracking with comprehensive logging

projects.name: Rust Distributed Workflow Orchestration
projects.description: A lightweight distributed workflow orchestration engine written in Rust. This repository is a working foundation for orchestrating tasks across complex pipelines and includes a Swagger UI for API exploration and testing.
highlights: DAG-based workflows with tasks and edges
Multiple built-in task types: Shell, HTTP, Python, Transform, Notify, Custom
Task retries, status tracking, and results (output, error, execution time)
REST API for creating, listing, starting, and managing workflows
Real-time updates via WebSocket (powered by Redis pub/sub)
Redis-backed event history (configurable size)
Swagger / OpenAPI documentation (Utoipa + Swagger UI)
Multi-stage Docker-friendly layout for container deployments

projects.name: Rust Hybrid Workflow Engine
projects.description: This is a powerful orchestration tool that allows you to define complex multi-step workflows using Lua configuration files, with automatic dependency resolution and data passing between steps.
highlights: Code-First Declarative Configuration: Define workflows using intuitive Lua syntax
Data Processing Pipelines: Chain together data fetching, transformation, and storage operations
DevOps Automation: Combine shell commands, Python scripts, JavaScript automation, and Lua logic for deployment workflows
Multi-Language Projects: Leverage the best of each language in a single workflow
Complex Orchestration: Handle intricate dependency graphs with automatic topological sorting

projects.name: Rust Cassandra Graph API
projects.description: A high-performance graph database API built with Rust, Axum, and Apache Cassandra. This project provides a RESTful API for managing graph data with nodes and edges, complete with interactive Swagger documentation.
highlights: Fast and Safe: Built with Rust and Axum for maximum performance and memory safety.
Scalable: Uses Apache Cassandra for horizontal scalability.
Graph Data Model: Support for nodes with properties and typed relationships (edges).
RESTful API: Clean HTTP endpoints for all graph operations.
Docker Support: Easy development setup with Docker Compose.
Health Monitoring: Built-in health check endpoints.
Error Handling: Comprehensive error handling with proper HTTP status codes.
